content.query:
SELECT distinct
job.ins_installer1 AS TECHNICIAN_ID
,ins.Name as TECHNICIAN_NAME
,'MXH' as [BRAND_NAME]
,ins.Active as ACTIVE_INACTIVE
FROM 
[ODS].[LP_MXH_job_Jobs] job
,[ODS].[LP_MXH_ins_Installers] ins
,[ODS].[LP_MXH_mld_MilestoneDetail] mld
WHERE 
job.ins_installer1 = ins.id
and job.id = mld.job_id
and mld.mdt_id = 'C'
and mld.ActDate is NOT NULL
AND datediff(DAY, mld.ActDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) <= 30

UNION

SELECT distinct
job.ins_installer2 AS TECHNICIAN_ID
,ins.Name as TECHNICIAN_NAME
,'MXH' as [BRAND_NAME]
,ins.Active as ACTIVE_INACTIVE
FROM 
[ODS].[LP_MXH_job_Jobs] job
,[ODS].[LP_MXH_ins_Installers] ins
,[ODS].[LP_MXH_mld_MilestoneDetail] mld
WHERE 
job.ins_installer2 = ins.id
and job.id = mld.job_id
and mld.mdt_id = 'C'
and mld.ActDate is NOT NULL
AND datediff(DAY, mld.ActDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoPST (getdate())) <= 30

UNION

SELECT distinct

,ins.Name as TECHNICIAN_NAME
,'MXH' as [BRAND_NAME]

FROM
